item.name: Apple M3
notes: Base M3 chip for MacBook Pro, iMac, MacBook Air.

metricValues.valueText: Excellent single-thread and GPU performance per watt.

item.name: Apple M3 Pro
notes: Pro-tier M3 for MacBook Pro, balanced performance and efficiency.

metricValues.valueText: Strong multi-thread and GPU, good for creative workflows.

item.name: Apple M1
notes: First Apple Silicon chip, revolutionary efficiency.

item.name: Apple M1 Pro
notes: Pro-tier M1 for MacBook Pro, more GPU and memory bandwidth.

metricValues.valueText: Great multi-thread and GPU for creative work.

item.name: Apple M1 Max
notes: Max-tier M1, 32 GPU cores, 400 GB/s bandwidth.

item.name: Apple M2
notes: Second-gen base chip, ~18% faster GPU than M1.

metricValues.valueText: Improved GPU and media engines over M1.

item.name: Apple M2 Pro
notes: Pro-tier M2, up to 12 CPU + 19 GPU cores.

metricValues.valueText: Strong all-rounder for developers and creators.

item.name: Apple M2 Max
notes: Max-tier M2, 38 GPU cores, 400 GB/s bandwidth.

item.name: Apple M3 Max
notes: 3nm Max chip, up to 40 GPU cores.

metricValues.valueText: Top-tier laptop chip for 3D and video.

item.name: Apple M4
notes: Latest base chip, debuted in iPad Pro.

metricValues.valueText: Best single-thread in a mobile chip.

item.name: Apple M4 Pro
notes: Pro-tier M4, strong multi-thread and GPU.
